nasb.text: and in the top basket there were some of all sorts of baked food for Pharaoh, and the birds were eating them out of the basket on my head.”

esv.text: and in the uppermost basket there were all sorts of baked food for Pharaoh, but the birds were eating it out of the basket on my head.”

cnv.text: 最上面的籃子裡，有為法老烤的各種食物，但飛鳥來吃我頭上籃子裡的食物。”

ccb.text: 最上面的一筐里放着为法老烤制的各种食物，有鸟来吃筐内的食物。”

csbs.text: 最上面的篮子里，有为法老烤的各样食物，但飞鸟却从我头上的篮子里吃那些食物。”
